items.title: Ron Harper Jr. inks a 3-year, $9 million deal to remain with the Celtics, per Shams.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Ron Harper Jr. inks a 3-year, $9 million deal to remain with the Celtics, per Shams.

He returned to the Org. last year. After winning 2-way roster spot, he fit in seamlessly in his opportunities w/ the parent club.

That earned him a standard contract & paved the way for this multi-year agreement.

items.title: Boston Celtics G/F Ron Harper Jr. intends to sign a new three-year, $9 million deal to return to the franchise, sources tell ESPN. The Celtics are declining Harper's $2.6M team option, clearing the way for the sides to commit on a longer deal.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Boston Celtics G/F Ron Harper Jr. intends to sign a new three-year, $9 million deal to return to the franchise, sources tell ESPN. The Celtics are declining Harper's $2.6M team option, clearing the way for the sides to commit on a longer deal.
